title: Create pomodoro
description: Telegram Pomodoro technique timer with classic/long/extended/short variants and custom user-supplied durations, phase-transition notifications, automatic work-time statistics accumulation into a durable stats.json file, do-not-disturb mode during active sessions, proactive once-per-day suggestions when the user falls behind on their plan, and crash-safe session state. Notification text uses the word 'помодоро' (no tomato emoji) for branding.
goal: Provide a Telegram-delivered Pomodoro technique timer with classic/long/short variants, automatic phase transitions, persistent state across restarts, and quiet-hours-aware notifications.
evidence: Requirements captured in chat: timer in TG with variants (classic 25/5, long 50/10, extended 100/20 = 1h40m/20m for deep-focus, short 15/3) plus user-defined custom durations via '/pomodoro start custom <w> <b>' or '/pomodoro start <w>/<b>' shorthand (bounds 1-240 / 1-60 min), cycle-based long break every 4 cycles, slash commands (start/status/skip/stop/stats and inline buttons), crash-safe state file, do-not-disturb filter that suppresses non-pomodoro messages while a session is active, a Telegram dialog warm-up check on first start (user must send /start once before bot messages deliver), a proactive suggestion flow that nudges the user to try a pomodoro when they are behind on their plan -- hard-capped at 1 suggestion per local calendar day, suppressed during active sessions and quiet hours, with its own durable suggestions.json state file, automatic accumulation of every work block (full or partial) into a durable stats.json with per-date and lifetime counters (credit rule 'actual_elapsed_capped' by default -- partial credit on skip/stop, full credit on normal completion and drift recovery), '/pomodoro stats' command to query today's and lifetime totals, and a per-day stats audit log for forensic reconstruction. Notification branding uses the word 'помодоро' (lowercase) instead of the tomato emoji per user preference. Mirroring existing goal-checkin-notifier structure (Telegram delivery, message action contract, proposal.json shape) for consistency.
